span.p:
Bootstrap (Accurate path)
pip: proteinfoundation + torch==2.7.0
+ PyG cu126 ABI + graphein==1.7.7
restartPython() — fresh kernel

div.style: color: rgb(6, 78, 59) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Load AME IN-PROCESS
ProteinaComplexaAME.from_pretrained()
kept on A10 GPU — no endpoint call
Build DevelopabilityCompositeReward

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center;

span.p:
Init MLflow run
generation_mode=Accurate
fk_n_branch · fk_beam_width
fk_temperature · fk_checkpoints

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; width: 200px;

→ iter_N_scoring → complete

diffusion paths

Score each branch
DevelopabilityCompositeReward
(7 axes) in-process on A10
reward guides diffusion itself

span.p:
Importance-sample
keep top fk_beam_width=4
temp=fk_temperature=1.0

div.style: color: rgb(6, 78, 59) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1. Generate scaffolds
run_ame_with_rewards()
AME diffusion + FK Feynman-Kac steering
IN-PROCESS on this job's A10 GPU

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center;

span.p:
2. Redesign sequences
ProteinMPNN endpoint
fixed motif positions preserved

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center;

span.p:
3. Structure prediction
ESMFold endpoint
PDB output + mean pLDDT

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center;

span.p:
4. Substrate complex
Boltz endpoint · ipTM score
(only if SMILES supplied)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6. Composite reward
weighted sum of 7 axes
z-score + min-max norm per batch
rmsd · plddt · boltz · solubility · half_life · thermostab · immuno

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7. Resample / accept top-K
softmax-weighted, temperature-controlled
loop back to step 1 with reward-biased parents

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
